classData.comment:
/**
 * A base class for AI Agents that manages multiple MCP Client connections
 * and orchestrates the autonomous cognitive runtime.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.Agent
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 */
classData.description: A base class for AI Agents that manages multiple MCP Client connections and orchestrates the autonomous cognitive runtime.
classData.name: Agent

classData.comment:
/**
         * The AI Provider class or string alias ('gemini', 'ollama').
         * @member {Neo.ai.provider.Base|String} modelProvider=GeminiProvider
         */
classData.description: The AI Provider class or string alias ('gemini', 'ollama').
classData.name: modelProvider

classData.comment:
/**
         * Configuration options for the provider instantiation.
         * @member {Object|null} providerConfig=null
         */
classData.name: providerConfig

classData.comment:
/**
         * The maximum number of interaction turns a sub-agent can execute
         * before being deliberately recycled to flush its context window.
         * @member {Number} maxSubAgentLifespan=50
         */
classData.description: The maximum number of interaction turns a sub-agent can execute before being deliberately recycled to flush its context window.
classData.name: maxSubAgentLifespan

classData.comment:
/**
         * A list of server names (keys in ClientConfig) to connect to.
         * @member {String[]} servers=[]
         */
classData.description: A list of server names (keys in ClientConfig) to connect to.
classData.name: servers

classData.comment:
/**
         * Registered sub-agent profiles available for delegation.
         * @member {Object} subAgents
         */
classData.name: subAgents

classData.comment:
/**
     * Enhances the base system prompt with mandatory overarching policies (e.g., Anti-Hallucination).
     * @returns {String} The fully resolved system prompt.
     */
classData.description: Enhances the base system prompt with mandatory overarching policies (e.g., Anti-Hallucination).
classData.name: getEnhancedSystemPrompt
activeSubAgents

classData.description: Map of connected Client instances, keyed by server name.
classData.name: clients

classData.description: Track turn numbers to prevent hallucination cascades.
classData.name: subAgentTurns

classData.description: Async initialization sequence. Creates and connects all configured clients, then initializes the Cognitive Runtime.
classData.name: initAsync

classData.description: Disconnects all clients and stops the loop.
classData.name: disconnect

classData.comment:
/**
     * Schedules an event for the agent to process.
     * @param {Object} event
     * @param {String} event.type
     * @param {*} event.data
     * @param {String} [event.priority]
     */
classData.description: Schedules an event for the agent to process.
classData.name: schedule

classData.comment:
/**
     * Spawns a sub-agent ephemerally to execute a task and return the synthesis.
     * @param {String} profileName The alias inside subAgents config.
     * @param {String} request The query/task to delegate.
     * @param {Boolean} [forceFresh=false] Whether to force a topic switch / new instance.
     * @returns {Promise<String>} The generated result content.
     */
classData.description: Spawns a sub-agent ephemerally to execute a task and return the synthesis.

params.description: Whether to force a topic switch / new instance.
params.name: forceFresh

classData.name: delegate
